title: Unity Software (U) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Analyst Consensus Rating: Unity Software has a consensus rating of Moderate Buy based on 9 buy ratings, 4 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings. Other sources show 20 analysts have given Unity Software a consensus rating of Buy, with 23 analysts having a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $36.43. Out of 35 Wall Street analysts, 18 rate it as Buy, 8 as Hold, and 1 as Sell, with a median price target of $31.00. Price Targets: The analyst price targets vary depending on the source. The average price target for Unity Software is $34.08. U's current price target is $38.77. The lowest target is $16 and the highest is $59. Recent Analyst Activity: Several price targets were raised in May 2026, with Wedbush raising to $32 from $30, Needham to $40 from $35, Jefferies to $34 from $30, Morgan Stanley to $35 from $32, and Oppenheimer to $38 from $32. Overall, the analyst consensus indicates a moderately bullish to bullish outlook on Unity Software stock as of May 2026.
